prompt: Create a photorealistic fashion portrait of an adult East Asian woman seated on a thick gray shag rug in a modern gray-toned living room, leaning back with one hand on the carpet and the other arm resting casually on a raised knee. She has long black hair in a high ponytail with wispy bangs, a calm cool expression, and looks directly into the camera. Outfit: a fitted semi-sheer gray lace high-neck long-sleeve top over subtle underlayer, light-wash high-waisted denim shorts, a delicate bracelet, and black ankle-strap stiletto sandals. Pose: one leg extended toward the camera in the foreground, the other knee bent upward, relaxed but confident. Background: a low gray fabric sofa with three visible cushions/pillows, concrete-textured gray wall, muted contemporary interior, soft shadows, no visible text. Use a vertical 4:5 composition, low camera angle near floor level, realistic skin texture, sharp focus on the subject's face and upper body with slight depth-of-field falloff toward the foreground foot and background sofa. Lighting should be soft, moody, and natural-looking, with a desaturated monochrome gray palette and subtle contrast, like an editorial indoor fashion shoot shot on a full-frame camera with a 35mm lens.
